extract.label: Isolate_Logo
extract.prompt: Task: Replace every background pixel in this image with pure solid #FF00FF magenta. Do not crop, resize, reframe, or recompose the image — output dimensions and layout must be identical to the input. Do not alter the logo's colours, shapes, text, or any other detail. Only the background changes to #FF00FF. Output image only, no text.

extract.label: Isolate_Subject
extract.prompt: Task: Replace every background pixel in this image with pure solid #FF00FF magenta. Do not crop, resize, reframe, or recompose the image — output dimensions and layout must be identical to the input. Do not alter the subject's colours, shapes, textures, or any other detail. Only the background changes to #FF00FF. Output image only, no text.

extract.label: Background_Color
extract.prompt: Task: Analyse this image and return the dominant background colour as a single hex code in the format '#RRGGBB'. Return only the hex code, nothing else.
